overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a futuristic downtown district. The player character moves from an open street lined with towering neon-lit skyscrapers into a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an overpass, encountering other pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with heavy atmospheric haze and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with mega skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked street while looking up at the towering neon-lit skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with vertical yellow neon lights and red illuminated accents
bright yellow linear neon lights running up the building facade
dark leafy trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a futuristic downtown district, with the camera walking along an open concrete sidewalk. A massive neon-lit skyscraper dominates the left side of the frame with vertical yellow lights, while dark trees line the right. The atmosphere is hazy with rain, and no other pedestrians are visible in this section of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching pedestrian overpass with digital advertising

events.description: approaching the concrete overpass structure with large digital billboard becoming prominent in view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the overpass structure, maintaining a steady walking pace

entered.detail: large concrete pedestrian or transit overpass spanning across the street ahead
illuminated advertising screen mounted on the overpass showing a character image
vertical cyan neon light fixture on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, the open street transitions toward a concrete overpass structure. A large digital billboard mounted on the overpass becomes the focal point, displaying bright advertising. The mega skyscraper remains visible on the left but appears closer, while the trees on the right fall behind. The environment remains exposed to the rain with neon lighting dominating the scene.

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the overpass, becoming sheltered from the rain
pedestrians come into view walking ahead in the covered passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian tunnel following a small group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead into the covered walkway, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the overpass providing shelter from the rain above
thick structural column supporting the overpass structure
vertical cyan neon light fixture illuminating the walkway
lit entrance to a building visible at the end of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass, providing shelter from the rain. The lighting shifts to artificial sources with cyan neon floor lights visible. Several pedestrians are now present ahead, walking in the same direction through the tunnel-like space. The mega skyscraper and billboard are no longer visible as the camera moves deeper into the covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an exposed, rainy street into a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins on an open concrete sidewalk beneath a hazy night sky, with a massive skyscraper featuring vertical yellow lights dominating the left and dark trees lining the right. As the camera advances, the open street transitions toward a concrete overpass where a bright digital billboard becomes the focal point and the skyscraper looms closer. The scene then shifts as the camera moves beneath the overpass, leaving the rain behind to enter a covered walkway illuminated by cyan neon floor lights. Finally, the environment closes in into a tunnel-like urban corridor where several pedestrians appear ahead, completely obscuring the previous skyline and billboards.
